svg.metadata: {"schema_version":1,"id":"23_far_crossroute","label":"Far left-right cross route","topology":"A distant supported L2-to-R2 cross-route meets the main B0-to-T0 road before the castle.","sockets":["B0","T0","L2","R2"],"socket_contract":{"B0":{"edge":"bottom","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.16},"T0":{"edge":"top","center":0.5,"direction":"vertical","road_width":0.035},"L2":{"edge":"left","center":0.375,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.016},"R2":{"edge":"right","center":0.375,"direction":"horizontal","road_width":0.016}}}
